name: github_add_org_copilot_seats_for_users
description: Add users to the Copilot subscription for an organization (POST /orgs/{org}/copilot/billing/selected_users). selected_usernames required. Returns HTTP 201 with seats_created. See [Add users to the Copilot subscription for an organization](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot/copilot-user-manageme
